agent_polished.description: Recommended default for autonomous agents: preflight checks enabled, animation injector enabled, auto-build sequence disabled for reliability.

agent_polished_animated.description: Animation-forward polished preset: keep curated animation injection on while avoiding auto target inference unless explicitly requested.

agent_strict.description: Fail fast mode for CI or quality gates. Any preflight hard failure exits non-zero.

agent_fast.description: Fast draft mode. Skips preflight and animation pass for iteration speed.
